title: pilosella schultesii subsp. tricoronaemontis
intro: Pilosella schultesii subsp. tricoronaemontis is a subspecies of the Pilosella genus, specifically a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella schultesii subsp. tricoronaemontis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or used topically as a salve.
